# OMC autoresearch

This compatibility command keeps `/oh-my-claudecode:autoresearch` available without loading the full generated skill description in every GitHub Copilot CLI session.
## Dispatch

1. Read the full generated Copilot skill instructions from
   `${PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills-copilot/autoresearch/SKILL.md`.
2. Follow that file exactly and treat the user's arguments as:

```text
$ARGUMENTS
```

If `${PLUGIN_ROOT}` is unavailable, locate the active installed OMC plugin
root and continue from its `skills-copilot/autoresearch/SKILL.md` file.
